falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the pattern's historical bottom characteristics and invalidate the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX volatility index rises above 30 (a 25% increase from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volatility would indicate a blowoff phase, directly contradicting the current blowoff score of 41 and HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: The pattern match similarity to bottom_2024_aug drops below 60% as measured by the system's algorithm within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant divergence from the historical pattern would invalidate the foundation of the current UNKNOWN verdict

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
